en: Another passion you share though is music. Music, yeah. I know you haven't, have you collaborated to the music together? No, never.
ko: 음악이라는 공통된 열정이 있잖아요. 둘이 음악으로 합작한 적 있어요?

en: No, no, no, we've never done that before.
ko: 아니요, 아니, 한 번도 해본 적 없어요.

en: you know, we have a studio that he works in,
you know, he's a very good rapper. Oh, thank you. And I appreciate it, but not yet.
ko: 꽤 실력 있는 래퍼예요. 고마워요. 하지만 아직은 안 해봤어요.

en: Maybe one day we'll do something. Well, I don't want to force you,
ko: 언젠가 같이 뭔가 해볼 수도 있겠죠. 강요하고 싶진 않아요.

en: and you can tell me to go away,
but I've got some, like, mics.
If you could, do you want to do a little bit of rapping? Oh, yeah. Mm, okay.
One, two, one, one, one, one.
ko: 하나, 둘, 하나, 하나, 하나, 하나.

en: You gotta stand up, you can't sit down and do it. You gotta stand out there. Alright. Okay.
ko: 일어나야 해, 앉아서 하면 안 돼. 저기 나가서 서야 해. 알겠어. 좋아.

en: Hello. Hello. How you doing there? Hello.
My name is Jayden and I'm a young fellow. Like to keep it mellow.
ko: 내 이름은 제이든, 난 어린 녀석이야. 차분하게 가는 걸 좋아하지.

en: I like to make friends and make trends.
ko: 친구 사귀고 트렌드를 만드는 걸 좋아하죠.

en: Girl, this is your chance, it's a long shot.
ko: 아가씨, 이게 니 기회야, 가능성은 낮지만.

en: Cupid tried to hit your boat, but it's the wrong shot.
